channel.title: Full Length Daocheng Video is Available
channel.description: CGZ has created a long video and put it online.

item.title: More Articles in Daocheng
item.description: I found cgz has compiled some articles about our Daocheng trip on his website (Chinese site). You can have a look. All the articles are contributed by the group members of the trip. More over, the Daocheng group (Chinese site) has been active for two m...
